Measurements were made using thin target techniques at

Target        Thickness  Diameter Purity Typical weight
radionuclides produced in the targets and monitor

Aluminum monitor foils were included in the stacks as a
secondary method of measuring the total number of
protons incident on the target stack using the
The total error in the cross section was
obtained by adding in quadrature, the following
errors: 2% for the number of target atoms; 5% for the
estimated error in the number of protons incident on
the target stack; 5% for the error in the detector
efficiency; and the statistical counting error.
